# PERF-110 negative: sync.Pool New returns a pointer type
lang: go
file: PERF-110-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "sync"

type Buf struct {
	Data []byte
}

var bufPool = sync.Pool{
	New: func() *Buf {
		return &Buf{Data: make([]byte, 0, 1024)}
	},
}

func _() {
	b := bufPool.Get()
	_ = b
	bufPool.Put(b)
}
